aas:langStringTextType.aas:text: Aspect model for requirements engineering in a customer supplier relationship.
Mainnode for all the Requirement related information
Supporting attachments such as images attached to a requirement.
Supporting attachments such as images attached to a requirement.
A binary representation of the Certificate of Analysis as a Base64-encoded document (e.g., PDF). This allows embedding the original document directly within the data payload.
Additional metadata that is associated with the requirement and not standardized in the aspect model.
Additional metadata that is associated with the requirement and not standardized in the aspect model.
Property for the requirement status of customer
Property for the requirement status of customer
Property for the requirement status of supplier
Property for the requirement status of supplier
Aspect model for requirements engineering in a customer supplier relationship.

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: Aspect model for requirements engineering in a customer supplier relationship.
The identifier of a requirement represented by a UUID, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.
The identifier of this exact version of the requirement represented by a UUID, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.
Base64-encoded string of the binary document file (e.g., PDF).
The MIME type of the encoded document (e.g., application/pdf).
A binary representation of the Certificate of Analysis as a Base64-encoded document (e.g., PDF). This allows embedding the original document directly within the data payload.
Supporting attachments such as images attached to a requirement.
Identifier from an external system (e.g. the Id of a requirement in another requirements tool)
The key may contain only letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.
Value string for the associated metadata
Additional metadata that is associated with the requirement and not standardized in the aspect model.
Mainnode for all the Requirement related information
Property for the customer status timestamp
Property for the requirement status of customer
Property for the supplier status timestamp
Property for the requirement status of supplier
The type of relationship of the two related requirements
Description for custom relationships between requirements. The description must include the relationship name and explanation.
Id of related requirement in form of a UUID
